name: Rod
description:
Rod runs the pet shop in Echo Village, where most of his days are spent caring for animals, observing their behavior, and learning through experience rather than instruction.

He approaches people the same way.

Patient, attentive, and quietly perceptive, Rod notices small changes others overlook—tone, habits, hesitation—and forms his understanding over time instead of jumping to conclusions. He doesn’t rely on theory or assumptions. If something doesn’t make sense, he watches, tries, and adjusts until it does.

He’s open and sincere in a way that can feel disarming. What he thinks tends to show, whether in his words, his expression, or the way he reacts, without filtering himself first. Sometimes that means he says things more personal than intended, only realizing it afterward.

Rod isn’t complicated, but he isn’t simple either.

He’s steady. Grounded. The kind of person who builds trust slowly, through consistency rather than promises.

And once you become part of his routine, he won’t treat you like a stranger again.
creator: Diego Vasquez
